svg.title: Data Platform — Standard Producer Journey

g.text: commit to data-contracts/ via GitHub API

svg.text: ↑ control plane writes · hot path + portal read ↓
PHASE 6 — HOT PATH (continuous · Dataflow pull OR REST publisher)

g.text: Pub/Sub or Kafka · IAM grant to platform SA

svg.text: PHASE 8 — CONSUMER ACCESS (fed by Knowledge Catalog)

g.text: REST or GraphQL endpoint, per grant

svg.text: All provisioned access grants — direct IAM, Kafka topic, Pub/Sub, REST & GraphQL — are recorded back to Knowledge Catalog so "who has access" is always answerable in one place.
gray = external/git · blue = Cloud Run · purple = GCP Workflows · teal = GCP-managed · amber = new resource per consumer grant
dashed border = prerequisite the platform cannot provision · data contract onboarding api and monitoring-portal/backend are separate services
